top_findings.summary: The skill requests authentication and access to Firebase/GCP projects, billing data, and usage statistics, which involve sensitive financial and project information. While cost estimation can be performed using public pricing data via web search (included as a fallback), the skill emphasizes using CLI tools and APIs that require user credentials, potentially leading to unnecessary collection of sensitive data beyond the minimal needs for general cost estimation.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill requests authentication and access to Firebase/GCP projects, billing data, and usage statistics, which involve sensitive financial and project information. While cost estimation can be performed using public pricing data via web search (included as a fallback), the skill emphasizes using CLI tools and APIs that require user credentials, potentially leading to unnecessary collection of sensitive data beyond the minimal needs for general cost estimation.
